---
name: Policy Question, Concern, or Proposal
about: Raise a question or concern about an existing policy, or start a conversation about a policy change or new policy
labels: policy
assignees: ''
---

## Which policy does this relate to?

<!-- If you clicked "Submit an Issue" from a policy page, this may already be filled in.
     Otherwise, name the policy or paste a link to the relevant document.
     If this is about a new policy that doesn't exist yet, write "New policy proposal" and describe the topic below. -->



## Type of issue

<!-- Check the one that best describes your submission. -->

- [ ] Question about an existing policy
- [ ] Concern about how a policy is working in practice
- [ ] Suggestion to improve or clarify an existing policy
- [ ] Early-stage proposal for a material policy change
- [ ] Early-stage proposal for a new policy

## Description

<!-- Describe your question, concern, or idea as clearly as you can.
     If you're referencing a specific section of a policy, please mention it.
     There's no wrong way to write this — we'll work with you to develop it further. -->



## What outcome are you hoping for?

<!-- What would a good resolution look like from your perspective?
     This helps us understand your goal, not just the problem. -->



## Additional context

<!-- Anything else that would help us understand your issue — background, related discussions, relevant external resources. -->



---

*After you submit, the Policy Maintainer will acknowledge your issue and help determine next steps. See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) for the full governance process.*
